name: GuidFieldOwnershipType
summary: Ownership semantics for a given GUID.

enum_values.name: Identifier
enum_values.summary: Uniquely identifies a given resource. There are no ownership implications as this is on the resource itself.

enum_values.name: UniqueReference
enum_values.summary: A unique reference to another resource. Ownership is implicit as no other resource can own this reference.

enum_values.name: SharedReference
enum_values.summary: A shared reference to another resource. Ownership is akin to reference counting.

enum_values.name: WeakReference
enum_values.summary: A reference to another resource that explicitly has no ownership. The reference may be invalid (i.e. the resource could be missing).

enum_values.name: OwnerReference
enum_values.summary: A reference to another resource that explicitly has direct ownership. Similar to UniqueReference but may be referenced by WeakReference GUIDs.

enum_values.name: ExternalReference
enum_values.summary: A reference to an external resource that is not specified via Identifier.
